description: A perfect wear for ballet dancers, these ballerina shoes are ergonomically designed to provide ample comfort to the feet. Wear them while you dance to your joy, or simply team them with casual wear for that cool look.UpperLeather upper for durability and comfortOpen toe box with a forefoot bow for style and comfortgathered sockliner hem for style MidsolePU midsole for durability and comfortOutsoleCupped outsole for comfort when dancingTPU outsole for durability and comfortshoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
